Dashboard Archive: 2026-03-25 Home
About This Dashboard
What It Does
Short-term momentum ranker scoring 700+ tickers on returns (1d to 1y), SMA gate (above 30/50/100/200 day), ratio consistency across timeframes, and resilience on bad SPY days. Higher composite scores indicate stronger, more consistent short-term momentum.
Today's Reading
# Market Analysis: Momentum-Ranker Data Today's data reveals an extraordinary outlier in TNGX, which ranks #1 with a composite score of 97.3—driven by a stunning 1,098.85% one-year return and exceptional ratio consistency (4 of 4 passes), though the 7.08% daily return masks highly volatile intermediate timeframes with a 5.31x jump from weekly to monthly returns. PL follows as a secondary performer with 784.5% annualized gains and similarly strong SMA positioning, but shows meaningful weakness with a bad_spy_score of 2.81 compared to TNGX's 0.38, suggesting PL struggles on market downturns while TNGX demonstrates superior resilience. Both tickers pass all four moving average gates and significantly outpace SPY and QQQ across multiple timeframes, but TNGX's ratio consistency and SPY-relative performance edge out PL's momentum quality. The data reflects a selective environment where a handful of names show genuinely explosive momentum with strong technical setup, while most other names in the 700+ universe likely lag substantially behind these leaders.
For educational and informational purposes only. Not financial advice. Past performance does not guarantee future results.
